subcodes.first_line: After rendering praise unto Him Who is entirely independent of me and my like, be it known that the exalted letters addressed to the noble presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعد الحمد لمن کان غنیا عنی و عن مثلی عرض میشود دستخطهای عالی که بجناب جود
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @unity; oneness of humanity
